title: Canonical foundational form enforcement
statement: Every generated finite foundational form has one exact identity representation: its complete canonical recursive construction trace with each node once and every held label, child relation and Fold return preserved; two forms are equivalent exactly when these traces agree.

candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of source-form coverage, node multiplicity, held-label preservation, child-relation preservation, return preservation, canonical-trace status and unforced-extra-data presence.
candidate_grammar.boundary: All exact-identity representations of forms admitted by the complete finite One/Fold grammar.

intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of 192 identity forms and canonical traces.
